info.title: HRnest API Documentation
info.description:
# General # The HRnest API allows you to: * Get holiday request data * Manage work timetables * Get registered working time * Get business trips data * Manage employee accounts We’re still adding more functions, if you have any suggestions - do not hesitate to let us know!

# API Endpoint # In all REST API calls, include the URL to the API service:

__[https://api.hrnest.io](https://api.hrnest.io)__

# Authentication All request you want to send to our API must contain authentication information according to __HTTP Basic Authentication__. __Username__ and __password (API key)__ you will find in HRnest panel in the API configuration section. Note: _Employee_ methods require additional permission for the API key (contact us if you want to use these methods). # Get started # To start using HRnest API and platform, you’ll need to create an account. Go to the [sign up page](https://hrnest.io/Account/Register?lng=en) to create your company account.

get.summary: Get business trips

parameters.name: filter.userId
parameters.description: Get business trips by the employee user ID

parameters.name: filter.departmentId
parameters.description: Get business trips by the employee department ID

parameters.name: filter.dateFrom
parameters.description: Get business trips that are later or equal to the date; default = Today

parameters.name: filter.dateTo
parameters.description: Get business trips that are earlier or equal to the date; default = Today

get.summary: Return company data
Get company departments
Check if specified day is a working day

parameters.name: search.date
parameters.description: Date to check; default = Today

get.summary: Return employee data

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Employee Id

400.description: Requested data is not a valid UUID

400.description: Requested data are not a valid

get.summary: Get employees data matching the specified filters

parameters.description: Get employees that are a active or not

201.description: Returns the newly created employee data

409.description: Employee user can't be created because of some conflicts

requestBody.description: Request containing the search and the employee data

200.description: Employee user data was successfully changed

409.description: Employee user can't be changed because of some conflicts

202.description: Employee user has already been removed

409.description: Employee user can't be removed because of some conflicts

get.summary: Get employees work hours list according to the specified restrictions
